content.question: The cost (in transition staffing, retraining, and administrative disruption) of a full or partial phase-out of early selection in Hungary is unquantified; Polish and other OECD countries' transition budgets are not published in comparable form.
content.reduction_path: A detailed costing study commissioned by the Ministry of Education, modelling (1) teacher retraining and CPD costs, (2) capital costs of track consolidation or creation, (3) transport/logistics costs, and (4) administrative overhead, across three phase-in scenarios (1-year, 3-year, 5-year).
